MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-09-2010 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 212

DEFENDANTS DAVID LEE AND ALBERT LEE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER TO MEDIATE IN LIEU OF JUDICIAL ARBITRATION IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE NOR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. CASE IS ORDERED REMOVED FROM JUDICIAL ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WITHIN FIVE DAYS. COURT ORDERED CASE SCHEDULED FOR JURY TRIAL ON 3/7/2011 AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 206. COURT TO GIVE NOTICE OF THE TRIAL DATE AND MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. COURT ORDERED A MEDIATION ENFORCEMENT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ON 12/22/2010 AT 10:00 AM, IN DEPARTMENT 212. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (212)

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For An Order To Conduct Voluntary Private Mediation In Lieu Of Judicial Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-09-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendants David Lee and Albert Lee's Motion for an Order to Mediate in Lieu of Judicial Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is ordered removed from Judicial Arbitration. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered case scheduled for Jury Trial on 3/7/2011 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court Ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 12/22/2010 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)
